title: Savory Silky Light Air Fried Tomato Stir-fry
description: This savory and light air fried dish features baby plum tomatoes in a silky sauce that is both low-calorie-friendly and enjoyable for the whole family.
instructions: Wash and finely chop the baby plum tomatoes.
Heat olive oil in an air fryer basket at a temperature between 200°C to 230°C (40-45 minutes).
Add minced garlic to the hot oil and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant, but be cautious not to burn it.
Stir in chopped tomatoes and cook for another 2-3 minutes until they soften slightly.
Drizzle with soy sauce and stir well. Let it simmer over low heat for a couple of minutes to meld the flavors together.
Add lime juice if desired, followed by sesame seeds (if using) and stir to incorporate all ingredients evenly.
Check seasoning and adjust according to taste.
